channel.title: Leading Out Loud
channel.description: Thirty minute interviews with leaders on psychological safety and how real teams work. Hosted by Dr. Jordan Brock.
channel.itunes:author: Dr. Jordan Brock
channel.itunes:summary: Conversations that turn one hard idea about candor and team dynamics into something a manager can try the next morning.

item.title: Naming the Unsaid
item.itunes:author: Dr. Jordan Brock
item.description: With Dr. Amy Lindgren. Why the most important thing in a meeting is often the sentence no one says, and how leaders draw it out.

item.title: Trust on the Trading Floor
item.itunes:author: Dr. Jordan Brock
item.description: With Karen Cho. What candor looks like under real financial pressure, and the cost of a team that stops asking questions.

item.title: When Safety Scales
item.itunes:author: Dr. Jordan Brock
item.description: With Marcus Webb. Holding a culture of speaking up together as a small team grows into a large one.

item.title: The Quiet Quitting Myth
item.itunes:author: Dr. Jordan Brock
item.description: With Dr. Brian Mitchell. Quiet quitting is not a worker problem, it is a measurement error. What leaders should track instead.
